name: Pork Chops and Oranges
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of mushroom soup, (10 1/2 oz.)
1 can La Choy Fancy Mixed Chinese vegetables (may substitute with bean sprouts)
2 small tomatoes or 1 can tomato wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork chops in a baking pan.
2. Generously coat each chop with cream of mushroom soup, using the entire can.
3. Layer the Chinese vegetables on top, using less than the entire can (or substitute with bean sprouts).
4. Sprinkle garlic powder over the chops.
5. Generously coat with soy sauce.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
7. Remove from the oven and add 2 tomato wedges to each chop; add 4 to 5 Mandarin oranges.
8. Return to the oven and bake an additional 15 minutes.
9. Serves approximately 4 people.
